title: DROP IN CENTER - 211info
text: CASCADE AIDS PROJECT DROP IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers assistance with orientation and navigation of services, including help with employment and housing applications, short-term rent support, and connections to community resources. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS and their families Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (503) 223-5907 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 223-5907 Intake (503) 223-5907 Hanna Gustafson [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Multiple TriMet MAX and bus lines within the block Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * AIDS/HIV Certificates/Forms Assistance * AIDS/HIV Specialized Information and Referral * AIDS/HIV Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - TESTING4ALL HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CAMP KC HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PEER-TO-PEER SUPPORT SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - CAP HOUSING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CASCADE AIDS PROJECT
